task_completion.description: Agent computed the apparent power using the '3 Phase Apparent Power Calculation' screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the '3 Phase Apparent Power Calculation' screen. The Terminal Current should be set to 65.1 A and Terminal Voltage to 415 V, with the Apparent Power result showing approximately 46794 VA.

task_completion.description: Agent computed the real and reactive power.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for fields (likely on the same power calculation screen) where Power Factor is entered as 0.86, showing Active Power around 40243 W and Reactive Power around 23879 VAR.

task_completion.description: Agent determined the CT secondary current using the 'CT Calculation' screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'CT Calculation' screen. The CT Ratio should be 100:5 and Sensed Current should be approximately 3.255 A (or 3.26 A), with the Actual Current showing 65.1 A.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct parameters into the 'Cable Size Calculator'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Cable Size Calculator' screen. The inputs must be: Source Voltage = 415, No of Phases = '3 Phase', Amperes = 65.1, Allowable Voltage Drop = 3, and One Way Distance = 50.

task_completion.description: Agent computed the correct minimum cable size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Cable Size Calculator' screen showing the computed Copper Wire Size as 4 AWG / 25 sq. mm.

task_completion.description: Agent ended the task on the Cable Size Calculator screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshot in the trajectory must show the 'Cable Size Calculator' screen with the recommended cable size visible.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the 'Electrical Engineering Calculations' app's GUI for all calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the actual interface of the Android app, rather than a generic calculator, web browser, or terminal.

integrity.description: Check that the calculation results are displayed in the app's native read-only result fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Results like '4 AWG / 25 sq. mm' or '46794 VA' should appear in the app's designated output areas, not typed into editable text boxes by the agent.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent navigated through the app's menus naturally.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of scrolling through the app's main menu to access the different calculators (3 Phase, CT/PT, and Cable sections), rather than using shortcuts to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must use the 'Electrical Engineering Calculations' app to perform three calculations based on a 37 kW motor (415 V, 92% efficiency, 0.86 PF). 1. Line Current is 65.1 A (P_input = 37000/0.92 = 40217 W; I = 40217 / (sqrt(3)*415*0.86) = 65.1 A). 2. Power Triangle: On the '3 Phase Apparent Power Calculation' screen, entering Terminal Current = 65.1 A and Terminal Voltage = 415 V yields Apparent Power (S) ≈ 46794 VA. Entering Power Factor = 0.86 yields Active Power (P) ≈ 40243 W and Reactive Power (Q) ≈ 23879 VAR. 3. CT Calculation: On the 'CT Calculation' screen, entering CT Ratio 100:5 and Sensed Current ≈ 3.255 A (or 3.26 A) yields an Actual Current of 65.1 A. 4. Cable Size: On the 'Cable Size Calculator' screen, entering Source Voltage = 415, No of Phases = '3 Phase', Amperes = 65.1, Allowable Voltage Drop = 3, and One Way Distance = 50 meters yields a Copper Wire Size of 4 AWG / 25 sq. mm. The agent must end on the Cable Size Calculator screen showing the results.
